properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v7 v8 v3 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Where's that greener grass you've been looking for You can't see it anywhere anymore You've been knocking down fences just to find it

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It seems no matter how hard you try You can't fill the void you have inside With anything in the world says it's enough You know that it will never be enough

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So come with me And I will show you Jesus And He will give you More than you could ask or imagine

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Come with me If you're looking for a Savior If you're looking for a friend I know someone you should meet So come with me Come with me, yeah, yeah, yeah

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Tired of every day being just another day You can't take it anymore anyway You've done everything in your power to change it

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It seems no matter how much you do Well, all your plans keep falling through Your new wings to get you off the ground, yeah For every time the world has let you down

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Come with me If you're looking for a Savior If you're looking for a friend I know someone you should meet

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I'm not claiming to hold all the answers But I'm holding on to the one who does Come with me And I will show you Jesus

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Come with me If you're looking for a Savior If you're looking for a friend I know someone you should meet Someone you should meet

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: So come with me Come with me, yeah Come with me, yeah And I will show you Jesus
